title: Smelting Overload
description: Campfires, smokers and blast furnaces smelt every vanilla item
body:
## Overview

Campfires, Smokers and blast furnaces can now smelt every <u>vanilla</u> item, but at a different speed:

- **Campfire**: 30 seconds
  
- **Normal Furnace**: 10 seconds
  
- **Smoker**: 2.5 seconds
  
- **Blast Furnace**: 0.5 seconds

Smoker crafting has been made slightly harder and to craft the blast furnace you will be required many more materials.

Recipes are data-driven, which means that all recipes can be removed or modified trough datapack.

## Feedback
This datapack also exists on curseforge.

For any problem related to the datapack version, leave a comment on this [curseforge project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/smeltingoverloaddatapack).

For any problem related to the mod version, leave a comment on this [curseforge project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smeltingoverload).
